programme.title: Friends

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Mind the Gap; Dirty Bubble Returns
programme.desc: Squidward closes the gap in SpongeBob's teeth, which causes a dramatic and unexpected change in his demeanor; the newly reformed Clean Bubble takes a dishwashing job at the Krusty Krab, where he is tempted by the grime.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.sub-title: A Tinkle in Time; TV or Not TV
programme.desc: Tinkle time travels; Bunny and Cecil celebrate Spend Time With One of Your Kids Day.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: After his house gets infested, Squidward checks into a hotel where a different kind of pest awaits him; SpongeBob and Patrick get duped into babysitting a grouchy old lady who keeps trying to escape.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Blood Is Thicker Than Grease; Don't Make Me Laugh
programme.desc: Plankton's family open their own restaurant directly next to the Chum Bucket; SpongeBob suddenly finds everything funny, much to everyone's annoyance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton's giant Chum Bucket glove runs wild in town, but SpongeBob has a handy friend to help them out; SpongeBob takes his first break ever at work.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: PL-1413; In the Mood to Feud
programme.desc: Plankton travels two thousand years into the future and finds a few unfamiliar faces; SpongeBob, Patrick and Sandy find themselves in the middle of a long-standing feud between the Narwhals and the Planktons.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: The Ghost of Plankton; My Two Krabses
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets ready for a hot date, but SpongeBob and Patrick give him a little more help than he needs; Plankton becomes a ghost to steal the secret formula; he requires a few lessons from the Flying Dutchman.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: Transformania
programme.desc: Van Helsing's mysterious new invention transforms Drac and his pals into humans, and Johnny into a monster. With their new mismatched bodies, Drac and the pack must find a way to switch themselves back before their transformations become permanent.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
